posts.topic: SoHo mystery walk — 112 Prince Street hides 150 years of secrets
posts.headline: Your phone buzzes. The clue is in this building.
posts.subtext: 112 Prince Street. A chat-based mystery walk through NYC. No guide. Just you and the city.

posts.topic: Grand Central secret platform — an interactive mystery you play through chat
posts.fact_text: Grand Central hides a secret platform 61 feet underground. StoryHunt takes you there — through clues sent to your phone.

posts.topic: West Village — the narrowest house in NYC holds a clue
posts.headline: 9.5 feet wide. One secret inside. Can you find it?
posts.subtext: Your phone sends clues. The city hides answers. A mystery walk through the West Village.

posts.topic: What happens when StoryHunt sends you into a hidden alley
posts.headline: The chat says: turn left into the alley. Now.
posts.subtext: 3:14 PM. A message arrives. You follow it. This is StoryHunt — an adventure played through your phone.

posts.topic: The Whispering Gallery — a StoryHunt clue hides in the ceiling
posts.headline: Whisper in the corner. Someone hears every word.
posts.subtext: The city is full of secrets. StoryHunt sends you to find them. A chat-based mystery walk.

posts.topic: Bryant Park underground library — StoryHunt reveals what's beneath
posts.fact_label: sq ft hidden beneath your feet
posts.fact_text: An entire underground library below Bryant Park. StoryHunt takes you to places most New Yorkers walk over without knowing.

posts.topic: Harlem — walk where jazz legends lived, guided by your phone
posts.headline: The jazz never stopped. Your phone takes you to where it started.
posts.subtext: Cotton Club. Strivers' Row. StoryHunt walks you through the history — via chat clues.

posts.topic: The city is a puzzle — StoryHunt lets you decode it
posts.quote:
The city is not a place.
It's a puzzle waiting to be decoded.

posts.topic: A hidden bar since 1854 — StoryHunt takes you to the unmarked door
posts.headline: No sign. No name. A door open since 1854. Can you find it?
posts.subtext: StoryHunt sends clues to your phone. You follow them through the streets. The city is the game.

posts.topic: Brooklyn Bridge wine cellar — what StoryHunt reveals inside the arches
posts.fact_text: A secret wine cellar inside the Brooklyn Bridge arches. StoryHunt reveals what's hidden in the places you think you know.

posts.topic: DUMBO — StoryHunt takes you below the bridge everyone photographs
posts.headline: Everyone photographs the bridge. Nobody looks underneath.
posts.subtext: StoryHunt shows you what's hidden. A chat-based mystery walk through DUMBO.

posts.topic: How StoryHunt works — the mosaic trail mission
posts.headline: New message: look down. The first clue is under your feet.
posts.subtext: Get clues via chat. Follow them through real streets. Solve puzzles. This is StoryHunt.

posts.topic: Abandoned station under City Hall — StoryHunt shows you how to see it
posts.headline: A subway station closed since 1945. You can see it. We show you how.
posts.subtext: StoryHunt takes you to places most New Yorkers never find. Via chat. On your phone.

posts.topic: Chrysler Building ceiling — StoryHunt trains your eyes to see what others miss
posts.fact_label: feet of art nobody looks up to see
posts.fact_text: A massive Art Deco mural on the Chrysler lobby ceiling. StoryHunt trains your eyes to see what others miss.

posts.topic: Chelsea — 200 galleries, a cookie factory, and a StoryHunt mission
posts.headline: 200 galleries. One hidden message. Your phone knows where.
posts.subtext: Chelsea decoded through chat clues. A mystery walk that reveals what galleries don't show.

posts.topic: Every building has a story — StoryHunt decodes them
posts.quote:
Every building has a story.
Most of them are classified.

posts.topic: Ghostbusters firehouse — a real StoryHunt stop in Tribeca
posts.headline: The Ghostbusters firehouse is real. StoryHunt takes you there.
posts.subtext: Hook & Ladder 8. Still in use since 1903. A mystery walk stop in Tribeca.

posts.topic: Central Park hidden cave — StoryHunt reveals the Ramble's secrets
posts.fact_label: acres of wilderness with a hidden cave
posts.fact_text: A hidden cave in Central Park's Ramble. Most New Yorkers walk past it. StoryHunt takes you inside.

posts.topic: Greenwich Village — three revolutions in six blocks, one StoryHunt mission
posts.headline: Three revolutions started here. One mystery walk covers them all.
posts.subtext: The Beats. Stonewall. Dylan. StoryHunt walks you through it — guided by chat.

posts.topic: How StoryHunt works — look up, the answer is in the architecture
posts.headline: The chat says: look up. You have 90 seconds. Clock starts now.
posts.subtext: A mystery walk played through your phone. Real clues. Real streets. Real NYC.
